metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/A.B. Logic - The Hitman (Extended Mix).flac
metadata.title: The Hitman (Extended Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:17.62] Watch out for the hitman
[00:19.24] Watch out - watch out - watch out - watch out
[00:33.77] Here we go back to a groove, back and forth to make you move
[00:36.97] Get up to the funky music on the dance floor and just swing it
[00:41.99] Tonight's the night for you to let it hang out
[00:42.99] You get funky while I get the house
[00:44.43] Now I know that you got soul, there it is, put the ace in the hole
[00:48.02] Feel the vibe while the rhythm control you, I command you to get loose
[00:52.18] Yeah, I know you like my style, grab a girl and get buck wild
[00:55.69] Show me what you got while the noise is pumpin'
[00:57.90] The DJ's spinnin', the crowd is jumpin'
[00:59.50] Turn up the music and let's motivate
[01:01.86] Do that thing until your body starts to break
[01:04.04] Watch out - watch out - watch out - watch out
[01:19.27] I won't give it up, baby till you drop
[01:21.22] Get down on the bea-eat (feel the pump from the hitman)
[01:25.66] The hitman makes you move, get into the groove
[01:28.95] Let's turn on the hea-eat (feel the pump from the hitman)
[01:32.28] Dance all ni-i-i-ight, dance all ni-ight
[01:40.78] Dance all ni-i-i-ight, dance all ni-ight
[01:50.27] Watch out - watch out - watch out - watch out
[02:13.07] Now it's time to prove that you can move
[02:14.37] But don't rush too fast, you might miss the last step
[02:17.43] To a dance concept, k-swing, I drop the power
[02:19.52] That'll keep you rockin' after hours
[02:21.95] Come on y'all, let's turn it up a notch
[02:23.94] The bass will vibrate, the dance floor will jump
[02:25.78] Up and down when the people start to yell
[02:27.56] Yeah, no time to chill, dance all night 'cause you gotta be strong
[02:31.79] There it is, you gotta move on, shake and bake your moneymaker
[02:35.13] And let me take you to a style
[02:37.38] That'll make you get down, get down, to a dope sound
[02:40.43] Watch out for the hitman
[02:43.68] Watch out - watch out - watch out - watch out
[02:58.85] I won't give it up baby
[03:02.33]
